features: ULTRA STRONG, ANTI BACTERIAL WIPES - Buzz antibacterial bathroom wipes provide excellent cleaning performance without fuss. They won't fall apart easily and will provide consistent and effective anti-bac cleaning results.
description: Ultra-strong wipes: Buzz bathroom cleaning wipes provide excellent cleaning performance without fuss. They won't fall apart easily and will provide consistent and effective floor cleaning results. Suitable for all floor types, including wood and laminate. Cleans & lightly polishes: Buzz bathroom wipes have been engineered specifically for use on flooring. They pick up dust, clean, lightly polish the surface and have been designed to dry quickly on the surface. Great value pack: With five packs of Buzz bathroom wipes, you will get 50 extra large wood and laminate floor wipes. Each pack has a resealable area, so your wipes stay fresh until you need them.
